description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs npm install gitbook-cli -g, then gitbook fetch latest and gitbook install. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that executes gitbook build . public, publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The pipeline should produce the built static site for GitLab Pages.
